pageDescription: Estimate pregnancy schedule based on due date, last period, ultrasound, conception, or IVF transfer date

labels.lastPeriod: First Day of Last Menstrual Period

firstTrimester.title: First Trimester (Weeks 1-12)
firstTrimester.description: Major organ development occurs during this period

secondTrimester.title: Second Trimester (Weeks 13-26)
secondTrimester.description: Baby's movements can typically be felt during this period

thirdTrimester.title: Third Trimester (Weeks 27-40)
thirdTrimester.description: Rapid growth and development in preparation for birth

criticalWarningsList.notDiagnostic: This calculator provides estimates only and is not a diagnostic tool
criticalWarningsList.individualVariation: Pregnancy timelines vary based on individual factors

importantNotesList: The due date is an estimate - only 5% of babies are born on their exact due date
Ultrasound dating may be more accurate in early pregnancy
Consult your healthcare provider for personalized pregnancy information
Regular prenatal care is essential for a healthy pregnancy

messages.enterInformation: Enter your pregnancy information to calculate important dates
messages.pregnancyWeek: You are currently in week {week} of pregnancy

disclaimer.title: Important Disclaimer
disclaimer.content: This calculator provides estimates based on general pregnancy information and should not be used as a substitute for professional medical advice. Individual pregnancy timelines may vary based on factors not accounted for in these calculations.

seekHelp.title: Consult Your Healthcare Provider
seekHelp.content: For accurate pregnancy dating and personalized prenatal care, please consult with your healthcare provider who can provide guidance based on your complete medical history and individual circumstances.

errors.lastPeriod: Please enter the first day of your last menstrual period
errors.dueDate: Please enter your expected due date
errors.ivfTransferDate: Please enter the IVF embryo transfer date
errors.crlMeasurement: Please enter the crown-rump length measurement

tooltips.calculationMethod: Select the method that best applies to your situation
tooltips.lastPeriod: The first day of your last menstrual period
tooltips.cycleLength: Your average menstrual cycle length in days
tooltips.crlMeasurement: Measurement from the top of the baby's head to bottom

modify_the_values_and_click_the_calculat: Modify the values and click the calculate button to use
enter_your_date_and_click_calculate_see_: Enter your date and click Calculate see your pregnancy schedule
the_pregnancy_calculator_estimates_your_: The Pregnancy Calculator estimates your pregnancy schedule based on the provided date and method. It uses standard medical formulas for due date, conception, and trimester calculation. Always consult your doctor for personalized advice.
the_estimated_date_when_your_baby_is_due: The estimated date when your baby is due. Calculated based on your selected method and input date.
pregnancy_is_divided_into_three_trimeste: Pregnancy is divided into three trimesters. The calculator shows which trimester you are currently in.
the_number_of_weeks_you_have_been_pregna: The number of weeks you have been pregnant, calculated from the start date to today.
the_results_above_are_a_guideline_for_ty: The results above are a guideline for typical situations. Please consult with a doctor for your pregnancy schedule if you have special medical conditions or questions.
